description: **MiMoCode as a second host + neutral benchmark subject.** Promoted from forge-top 2026-06-14 (`MIMO-INTEROP`). MiMoCode (OpenCode fork, 2026-06-10) keeps MCP + the Claude-Code SKILL.md/command/agent format + "Import from Claude Code" → interop substrate. Sanity-checked vs source: compose (`@modelcontextprotocol/sdk` StdioServerTransport, `server/compose-mcp.js:820`) + stratum-mcp (FastMCP/`mcp>=1.0`) register/list/call **unchanged** under any stdio-MCP host; full flows need host-surface adapters (host Agent/Skill dispatch, Compose's separate :4001 HTTP server, skill tool-name mapping). Leg (b): MiMo's self-reported "beats Claude Code at 200+ step tasks" → first external COMP-BENCH subject. Low urgency. See `docs/features/COMP-MIMO-INTEROP/plan.md`.
